beats: Visitors gather at clean room entrance, reading signage and access control panel

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 欢迎欢迎参观净水工厂滤芯车间。本车间为洁净管控区域，进入前请先了解以下注意事项。为了保证产品质量、现场安全和洁净环境，请大家按照要求进入，不随意、不触碰、不拍摄。

prompt.positive: 16:9 cinematic wide shot, clean room entrance with door access panel and warning signage, group of visitors in casual clothes standing and reading, bright industrial lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style
prompt.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, dark lighting, cluttered background

_video_prompt.prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间入口. 门禁系统, 车间标识牌, 告示栏, 洁净通道入口. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明. character (visitor_group): hair fully covered by cleanroom cap, white cleanroom suit, mask, cleanroom shoes or shoe covers, visitor badge + no exposed personal items. prop (warning_signage): state: displayed, visually consistent. Visitors gather at clean room entrance, reading signage and access control panel. Narration: "欢迎参观滤芯洁净车间。本车间为洁净管控区域，进入前请先了解以下注意事项。为了保证产品质量、现场安全和洁净环境，请大家按照要求进入，不随意、不触碰、不拍摄。". Camera motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up. 16:9 cinematic wide shot, clean room entrance with door access panel and warning signage, group of visitors in casual clothes standing and reading, bright industrial lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
_video_prompt.negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱物品, 敞开大门, 普通衣物, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, dark lighting, cluttered background, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
_video_prompt.motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up
_video_prompt.tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
